message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0

title SectionType Referenced-by View

package "work-product-component Entities" {
    class "«work-product-component»\nTubularComponent" as TubularComponent {
        +SectionTypeID
    }
}

abstract class "«Abstraction»\nAbstractReferenceType" as AbstractReferenceType

class "«reference-data»\nSectionType" as SectionType

TubularComponent --> SectionType
SectionType --|> AbstractReferenceType

circle "A" as A
circle "C" as C1
circle "C" as C2

note A of AbstractReferenceType
note C1 of TubularComponent
note C2 of SectionType

@enduml
```
